creator: markun@onohara.to
text:
Hello Jase and culot,

Thanks for making and reviewing this patch.
I approved the second patch, but I forgot to check dependency of
upstream. I appologize for my mistake.

I checked and tested Jase's third patch
(p5-POE-Component-Server-IRC-1.49.patch) with p5-POE-Component-IRC 6.68
(PR ports/156502 patch-6.diff) on my own tinderbox, and it worked fine.

Please commit the third patch after the PR ports/156502 is closed and
p5-POE-Component-IRC is updated to 6.58.

Thanks in advance,

-- 
TERAMOTO Masahiro <markun@onohara.to>
